title: Backstage Environment Variables
description: Environment variable contract for the Backstage real-time pipeline service. Derived from repos/domain/realtime/backstage/.env.template.

PORT.description: HTTP port the Backstage NestJS service listens on.

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection URI for pipeline event persistence.

NATS_URL.description: NATS broker connection URL for event consumption.

MOCK_MODE.description: When 'true', uses mock event generators instead of real NATS subscriptions.

USE_SSE.description: Feature flag. When 'true', enables SSE pipeline controller; when 'false', uses Socket.IO WebSocket gateway.
